name: Code Preview
description: Terminal or code showcase section for installation commands, code examples, and API demos.

terminal.description: Full-width terminal-style CodeBlock with copy button.

slots.code: Full-width CodeBlock with language label and copy button

split.description: Two-column layout: left has heading + description + tech chips, right has CodeBlock.

slots.heading: Section heading with d-gradient-text
slots.description: Supporting text explaining the code example
slots.chips: Tech stack or feature chips (Chip components)
slots.code: CodeBlock with syntax highlighting and copy

auradecantism.notes: CodeBlock wrapper uses d-glass-strong. Heading uses d-gradient-text.

preset_notes.split: Left heading uses d-gradient-text. Right CodeBlock wrapped in d-glass-strong.

command-center.notes: CodeBlock uses cc-frame. Heading uses cc-data.

clean.notes: Standard CodeBlock styling. No glass or gradient effects.
